summary: Sprint 3 Encryption Management testing complete. All 36 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend page fully functional with all 4 tabs, dialogs, and key/job management features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test keys created during testing: TEST-key-*, TEST-revoke-*, TEST-job-key-*, TEST-active-*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 Encryption Management implementation verified. All endpoints working: /api/ops/encryption/keys/register, /keys, /keys/{key_id}, /keys/{key_id}/summary, /keys/active/{key_type}, /keys/rotation/initiate|complete|cancel, /keys/emergency-revoke, /reencryption/create|start|pause|cancel, /reencryption/jobs, /dashboard, /dashboard/keys, /dashboard/jobs, /audit/keys, /audit/jobs, /setup-indexes. Frontend EncryptionManagementPage has 4 tabs (Genel Bakis, Anahtarlar, Yeniden Sifreleme, Denetim Gunlugu). Key state transitions working (active -> pending_rotation -> retired/revoked). Re-encryption jobs with progress tracking working. Audit logs capturing all operations.

tests.test: Summary cards display (5 Active, 1 Pending, 1 Retired, 1 Revoked, 0 Overdue, 2 Jobs)
Tab 1: Genel Bakis (Overview) - Aktif Anahtarlar, Aktif Isler sections
Tab 2: Anahtarlar (Keys) - Tum Anahtarlar list with state badges
Tab 3: Yeniden Sifreleme (Jobs) - Job list with progress bars
Tab 4: Denetim Gunlugu (Audit) - Key and Job audit logs
Register Key dialog opens with form fields
Create Job dialog opens with key selector and collections
Key action buttons (Rotasyon, Tamamla, Iptal) present
Job action buttons (Baslat, Durdur, Iptal) present

sprint3_features_verified.key_registry: Full CRUD with register, list, get, summary endpoints working
sprint3_features_verified.key_state_management: State transitions (active -> pending_rotation -> retired/revoked) working correctly
sprint3_features_verified.emergency_revoke: Requires detailed reason (min 10 chars), immediately revokes key
sprint3_features_verified.reencryption_jobs: Create, start, pause, cancel operations working with progress tracking
sprint3_features_verified.dashboard_endpoints: Main dashboard, keys dashboard, jobs dashboard all returning correct data
sprint3_features_verified.audit_logs: Key and job audit logs capturing all operations with timestamps and actors
sprint3_features_verified.frontend_tabs: All 4 tabs (Genel Bakis, Anahtarlar, Yeniden Sifreleme, Denetim Gunlugu) functional
sprint3_features_verified.frontend_dialogs: Register Key and Create Job dialogs working with proper form validation
